allow: PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://focusgroup.co.uk/" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $resp.Content; "=== TEL link occurrences ==="; \([regex]::Matches\($html, 'tel:0330\\d+'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }\); "`n=== Lines around 'tel:' ==="; \($html -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match 'tel:' } | Select-Object -First 5\); "`n=== Subscribe / newsletter / email-related markup ==="; \($html -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match '\(?i\)\(subscribe|newsletter|stay up to date|sign up\)' } | Select-Object -First 8\);)
